title: Top K Frequent Elements
description: Given an integer array nums and an integer k, return the k most frequent elements. You may return the answer in any order.

examples.explanation: The number 1 appears 3 times and the number 2 appears 2 times in the array. Therefore, the two most frequent elements are 1 and 2.
There is only one element in the array, which is 1. Hence, it is the most frequent element.
The number -1 appears 2 times, and the number 2 appears 2 times as well. Both are the most frequent elements with the same frequency.

constraints: k is in the range [1, the number of unique elements in the array].
hints: Consider using a hash map to count the frequency of each element.
Think about how you can efficiently retrieve the top k elements from your frequency data.
Consider edge cases where all elements are unique or the same.
You might want to explore different data structures that can help you maintain order while counting.
